data.cluster_id: Cluster id (advanced, leave empty to auto-discover)
data.router_id: Router id (advanced, leave empty to auto-discover)

error.cluster_router_pair: Set both cluster id and router id, or leave both empty for auto-discovery

init.title: Helvar scene options
init.description: Scene display names: one per line as `group.block.scene = Friendly name` (e.g. `1.1.3 = Dinner`). Off scenes: one per line as `group = block.scene` (e.g. `1 = 1.15`); groups without an entry are switched off with a direct level of 0.

error.invalid_options: One or more lines could not be parsed - see the log for details
